title: HTTP signature generation and verification
description: Implement in fieldwork::signatures. Generation: sign outbound POST requests (delivery, Accept activities) with actor's RSA private key per HTTP Signatures spec (draft-cavage-http-signatures). Verification: verify inbound inbox POSTs by fetching sender's public key from their actor document. Key fetch uses fieldwork::fetch with caching. Support Signature and (deprecated) Authorization header formats for interop with Mastodon.
close_reason: Persona CRUD with RSA 2048 keypair gen working. HTTP signatures sign/verify implemented.
